name: sxtg
documentation: Sxtg-lib

classes.name: sxtg.redis_connection.RedisConnection

methods.name: sxtg.redis_connection.RedisConnection.__new__
documentation: Ensures that only one instance of RedisConnection exists.

methods.name: sxtg.redis_connection.RedisConnection.initialize
documentation:
Initializes the Redis connection using the provided URL.

Args:
    redis_url (str): The Redis connection URL.

Raises:
    Exception: If the connection to Redis fails.

methods.name: sxtg.redis_connection.RedisConnection.close
documentation:
Closes the Redis connection if it is open.

Raises:
    Exception: If an error occurs while closing the connection.

methods.name: sxtg.redis_connection.RedisConnection.__getattr__
documentation:
Delegates attribute access to the Redis connection instance.

Args:
    name (str): The attribute name to access.

Returns:
    Any: The attribute from the Redis connection.

Raises:
    AttributeError: If the Redis connection is not initialized.

Singleton class for managing a Redis connection.
Provides methods to initialize, close, and interact with Redis.

classes.name: sxtg.bot_settings.BotSettings

methods.name: sxtg.bot_settings.BotSettings.__new__
documentation: Ensures that only one instance of BotSettings exists.

methods.name: sxtg.bot_settings.BotSettings.initialize
documentation:
Initializes the BotSettings instance with a Redis connection and loads all settings.

Args:
    redis_instance (Redis): An instance of Redis client.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the provided Redis instance is None.

methods.name: sxtg.bot_settings.BotSettings.update_all
documentation:
Updates all bot settings from Redis and stores them in the settings dictionary.

Raises:
    RuntimeError: If Redis instance is not initialized.

methods.name: sxtg.bot_settings.BotSettings.update
documentation:
Updates a specific bot setting from Redis and stores it in the settings dictionary.

Args:
    key (str): The key of the setting to update.

Raises:
    RuntimeError: If Redis instance is not initialized.

methods.name: sxtg.bot_settings.BotSettings._set_setting
documentation:
Parses and sets a setting in the settings dictionary.

Args:
    key (str): The Redis key of the setting.
    value (str): The value of the setting.

methods.name: sxtg.bot_settings.BotSettings._log_all_settings
documentation: Logs all settings currently loaded in the instance.

methods.name: sxtg.bot_settings.BotSettings.__getattr__
documentation:
Dynamically retrieves a setting value.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the setting to retrieve.

Returns:
    Union[bool, str]: The value of the setting, or False if the setting is not found.

Singleton class for managing bot settings stored in Redis.
Provides methods to initialize, update, and retrieve settings.

classes.name: sxtg.bot_content.TextContent

methods.name: sxtg.bot_content.TextContent.__new__
documentation: Ensures that only one instance of TextContent exists.

methods.name: sxtg.bot_content.TextContent.initialize
documentation:
Initializes the TextContent instance with a Redis connection and loads all texts.

Args:
    redis_instance (Redis): An instance of Redis client.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the provided Redis instance is None.

methods.name: sxtg.bot_content.TextContent.update_all
documentation:
Updates all text entries from Redis and validates their formatting.

Raises:
    RuntimeError: If Redis instance is not initialized.

methods.name: sxtg.bot_content.TextContent.update
documentation:
Updates a specific text entry from Redis and validates its formatting.

Args:
    key (str): The key of the text entry to update.

Raises:
    RuntimeError: If Redis instance is not initialized.

methods.name: sxtg.bot_content.TextContent._check_formatting_errors
documentation:
Checks for formatting errors in the text (e.g., incorrect curly braces).

Args:
    key (str): The Redis key of the text.
    text (str): The text content to validate.

Raises:
    SystemExit: If formatting errors are detected.

methods.name: sxtg.bot_content.TextContent._log_all_texts
documentation: Logs all text entries currently loaded in the instance.

methods.name: sxtg.bot_content.TextContent.__getattr__
documentation:
Dynamically retrieves a text entry as a Content object.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the text entry to retrieve.

Returns:
    Content: A Content object wrapping the text entry.

Singleton class for managing text content stored in Redis.
Provides methods to initialize, update, and retrieve text content.

classes.name: sxtg.bot_content.Content

methods.name: sxtg.bot_content.Content.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the Content object with a message.

Args:
    message (str): The text message to wrap.

methods.name: sxtg.bot_content.Content.__call__
documentation:
Formats the text message with the provided keyword arguments.

Args:
    **kwargs: Key-value pairs to replace placeholders in the text.

Returns:
    str: The formatted text message.
Wrapper class for text content that supports dynamic formatting.
